product_concept.name: Consumer Discovery MVP (Phase 1 Focus)
product_concept.description: Implementation focused exclusively on Pillar 1 (Home Real Property Assistant) to prioritize user acquisition, property data ingestion (images, 3D splats), and service provider matching for individual homeowners.
who_it_serves: Property investors managing one or more residences
product_concept.problem_it_solves: Property owners wasting time finding reliable contractors, comparing inconsistent bids, and managing follow-up/scheduling.

confirmed_assumptions.assumption: The MVP should prioritize the 'AI Agent' discovery experience over a manual directory.
Vendor onboarding is treated as an external process (non-internal platform requirement) for V1.
Offline capabilities for homeowners are secondary to the primary web-based experience.
The 'Digital Asset' ingestion (3D Gaussian Splats, images) is a prerequisite for the service matching logic.
Accounting/Financials (Pillar 2/3) are strictly out of scope for this MVP.
The platform must replicate Vantaca's 'System of Action' (Action Items) methodology.
The MVP targets 'Production Grade' financial handling (Auditable, compliant GL structure).
Integration with government services (Permits/BLDS) is critical for the ARC domain.
The MVP assumes a 'Single Tenant' or 'Multi-Tenant' model where HOAs are distinct tenants.
AI extraction of documents (CC&Rs, Bylaws) is a core feature, not an afterthought.
The MVP must function as an 'Operating System for the Trades' (ServiceTitan Model).
Mobile App is a critical component for offline-first capabilities.
Job Costing and Profitability are required immediately to attract contractors.
The platform must support 'Offline mode with queueing' for remote sites.
The MVP assumes a 'Good-Better-Best' quoting model is needed for estimates.

confirmed_constraints.constraint: Must use SvelteKit for the frontend portal.
Must use Bun for high-performance API execution.
Must use DBOS versioned workflows for the service call lifecycle.
Must enforce Row-Level Security (RLS) for multi-tenant isolation.
Must use SeaweedFS for media asset storage.
Must strictly follow the defined pillars (Phase 1 only) for feature gating.
Must use Cerbos for policy-based authorization engine (Board vs. Staff access).
Must support Statutory deadlines (Notice requirements) via Rules Engine.
Must support Mass Email/SMS (Domain 7) for violation notices and meeting notices.
Must adhere to Vantaca model for CAM workflows.
Must support Reserve Studies and Funding Plans (Domain 11).
Must use DBOS for durable, versioned workflows (Domain 3).
Must integrate with Stripe/Square for Payment capture (Domain 7).
Must use Traefik as the sole ingress proxy.
Must use FFmpeg for video processing (evidence capture).
Must strictly follow the ServiceTitan business domains (Identity, Workforce, Pricebook, etc.).

out_of_scope: Field Service Engine MVP features (Phase 2 Focus)
Full offline-first capabilities for Homeowners (Secondary priority)
Legacy Vantaca integration for V1 (Replicate 'System of Action' only)
Advanced AI extraction beyond CC&Rs/Bylaws for V1
Direct Contractor Portal Access for V1
